Fun Pictures

Fun, joy and good company.

Parties, farewells, a graduation dinner and lab days from my time at IIT Guwahati. Newest first, so the latest fun is right up top.

June 2026

Defence done, so we partied

The M.Tech defence is finally behind us. Of course that called for a celebration. Thank you to sir and all the lab mates who showed up to make it special.

June 2026

Defence day

All three of us defended on the same day, me, Noman and Sharvani. A big thank you to my guide Dr. Rajiv Kumar Kar and the lab seniors for the guidance that got us here.

May 2026

Farewell party

A warm send off put together by the juniors. Thank you for the lovely evening, and for the cute gift that I will keep for a long time.

April 2026

Graduation dinner

Good food, great company and a graduation worth raising a glass to. One of those nights you do not want to end.

March 2026

Lab photo day

The whole lab squeezed into one frame. Everyone in their best, smiles all round. A photo worth keeping.
